deadline_notes: Annual CPE by August 1 (renewal deadline). CPE period: July 1 – June 30.
notes: DISTINCTIVE: No ongoing ethics CPE requirement — only initial AICPA ethics exam for licensure. Widely misreported by aggregators. Rolling 120hr/3yr. 100% self-study OK. 24hr non-technical cap/3yr for public accountants. $100 late fee after August 1. 90-day extension available once.
